signals.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Holding with New Talks Signaled; Kremlin Welcomes Deal | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Holding with New Talks Signaled; Kremlin Welcomes Deal | YES | HIGH confidence**

A US-Iran ceasefire, now 6-7 days old and extended in principle past next Tuesday, is holding amid reports of new negotiations possibly starting Thursday in Pakistan, with Trump pushing for limits on Iran's nuclear program in exchange for sanctions relief[1][2][3].
